samplingFrame: Core 28-document set drawn from Abraham Lincoln's speeches, letters, and public addresses (1838-1865), fully annotated in lincoln-metaphor-analysis. PPW #195 registered 36 documents: 28 confirmed (v3 baseline, present in corpus_manifest.json) plus 8 planned v4 additions from LMA #113. The v4 target of 48 requires 12 more documents when LMA #113 resolves. Validation (75-100 docs) and reference tiers tracked in PPW #196 and #197.
notes: PPW #195 populated documents.json with 36 entries: 28 confirmed (v3 baseline from corpus_manifest.json) and 8 planned v4 additions from LMA #113. Per-corpus folder created in PPW #137. 12 more documents needed to reach v4 target of 48; these will be specified when LMA #113 resolves. Raw text import planned for Milestone 16 (PPW #198).

samplingFrame: 41-document stratified corpus spanning American Revolution, Napoleonic, Lincoln, and Nazi-era cases under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice, selected via the sacrifice-law-workbench manifest-driven pipeline. American Revolution and Napoleon case mapping to PPW cases is pending confirmation (PPW #149-#151). Corpus import into PPW is planned for Milestone 17.
notes: American Revolution and Napoleon cases do not yet have corresponding PPW case files; case mapping must be confirmed (PPW #149-#151) before their corpus subsets are imported. Corpus import planned for Milestone 17. No documents imported yet as of Milestone 15; per-corpus folder created in PPW #138.
